articles.title: Gov. Healey backs bill to keep Mass. bars open until 3 a.m. this summer
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> The legislation would allow licensed establishments to sell alcohol one hour later than their normal closing time, up to 3 a.m., between June 1 and Aug. 31, 2026.
